title: Sumerian/Akkadian: MUL.APIN: Astronomical Texts
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: MUL.APIN: Astronomical Texts.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: MUL.APIN: Astronomical Texts.

translation.text: From 'MUL.APIN: Astronomical Texts': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
